things.name: Sapo National Park
things.description: West Africa's second largest rainforest with pygmy hippos and chimpanzees

things.name: National Museum of Liberia
things.description: Liberian history from founding by freed American slaves to modern times

things.name: Providence Island
things.description: Island in the Mesurado River where the first freed American slaves landed in 1820

things.name: Barnersville Beach
things.description: Atlantic beach north of Monrovia with beach bars and surfing

things.name: Ducor Hotel Ruins
things.description: Hilltop Intercontinental Hotel ruins with panoramic views - symbol of Liberia's civil wars

things.name: Old Capitol Building
things.description: American-inspired antebellum architecture from Liberia's founding era

things.name: Kendeja Resort & Waterpark
things.description: Beach resort south of the city with Atlantic swimming

things.name: Elwa Beach
things.description: Long Atlantic beach accessible from the city

things.name: Palm Butter Soup with Rice
things.description: Liberia's national dish - palm nut broth with chicken, fish and bitter balls
